insights.title: [CAPABILITY-NEED GAPS] Recycling Infrastructure Access Gap
insights.description: There is a significant need for recycling infrastructure access, but only a limited number of entities provide this capability. This gap could hinder the effective processing and management of waste materials.

insights.title: [VALUE CHAIN GAPS] Design for Circularity and Modularity Underrepresentation
insights.description: The ecosystem lacks sufficient focus on designing products with circularity in mind, which is crucial for reducing waste at the source. Only two entities are involved in this activity.

insights.title: [ROLE DISTRIBUTION GAPS] Underrepresented Roles
insights.description: Several critical roles such as END_USERS, MEDIA, and NGOs are underrepresented with only one entity each. This imbalance could limit the ecosystem's ability to engage stakeholders effectively.
entities_involved: END_USERS (1 entities), MEDIA (1 entities), NGOs (1 entities)

insights.title: [GEOGRAPHIC GAPS] Uneven Geographic Distribution of CE Actors
insights.description: The ecosystem has a high concentration in certain areas like Șoseaua Griviței but lacks presence in other regions, which could limit the reach and impact of circular economy initiatives.

insights.title: [ACTIVITY COVERAGE GAPS] Missing Sharing and Rental Services
insights.description: The ecosystem lacks activities related to sharing platforms or rental services, which are important for extending the lifecycle of products through alternative usage models.
